Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: French Kweebec's home is everything you expect. A conspicuous flag hangs over his bed, but the rest of it is pretty standard for a Kweebec. Roots and vines hang off of every surface, potted plants stand where the first two couldn't catch on--

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: --and, of course, a fully-kitted kitchen is embedded in a crevice. It seems that heat is still emanating from an ash-covered oven, however long it was since French Kweebec had it on.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: You can't focus on it for too long, though, as pungent spices soon assault your nostrils.
